2026/05/22 17:00:29.426198978 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426206973 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426246912 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426249818 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426360184 {
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426362389 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426385702 new <- list()
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426392595 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426406892 new$width <- width
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426407864 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426422231 new$height <- height
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426423132 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426438301 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426439182 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426469659 new$title <- title
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426470872 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426489136 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426491911 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426512460 new$version <- version
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426513401 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426528029 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426528850 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426543834 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426546549 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426589940 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426591283 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426604908 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426605760 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426618484 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426619496 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426633702 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426634604 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426715826 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426717229 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426747769 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426750083 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426771683 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426772515 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426787633 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426788465 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426803794 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426804815 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426846704 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426857744 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426876820 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426877642 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426893952 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426894874 "default"))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426912577 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426913599 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426928026 }
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426928848 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426943846 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426944758 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426960036 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426960938 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426976587 }
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426977439 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426990744 }
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426991575 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427004710 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427005552 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427020209 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427021171 domain = NA)
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427036920 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427037812 }
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427050957 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427051948 old$family <- family
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427067457 }
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427068339 version <- old$version
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427080933 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427081834 "2.0")
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427105639 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427107072 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427123963 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427124855 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427139543 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427140384 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427157065 domain = NA)
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427158017 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427174548 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427175470 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427198022 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427199014 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427258405 invisible()
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427260178 }

2026/05/22 17:00:29.426198978 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426206973 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426246912 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/05/22 17:00:29.426360184 {
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426362389 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426385702 new <- list()
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426392595 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426406892 new$width <- width
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426407864 if (!missing(height))

2026/05/22 17:00:29.426423132 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426438301 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426439182 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426469659 new$title <- title

2026/05/22 17:00:29.426489136 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426491911 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426512460 new$version <- version
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426513401 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426528029 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426528850 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426543834 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426546549 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426589940 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426591283 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426604908 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426605760 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426618484 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426619496 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426633702 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426634604 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426715826 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426717229 if (!missing(useDingbats))

2026/05/22 17:00:29.426772515 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426787633 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426788465 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426803794 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426804815 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426846704 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426857744 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426876820 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426877642 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426893952 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426894874 "default"))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426912577 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426913599 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426928026 }
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426928848 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426943846 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426944758 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426960036 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426960938 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426976587 }
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426977439 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426990744 }
2026/05/22 17:00:29.426991575 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427004710 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427005552 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427020209 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427021171 domain = NA)
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427036920 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427037812 }
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427050957 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427051948 old$family <- family
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427067457 }
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427068339 version <- old$version

2026/05/22 17:00:29.427081834 "2.0")

2026/05/22 17:00:29.427123963 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427124855 onefile <- old$onefile

2026/05/22 17:00:29.427140384 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),

2026/05/22 17:00:29.427158017 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427174548 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/22 17:00:29.427175470 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
